name: Italian Parmesan Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the grill.
2. Cut a 14 inch square sheet of heavy duty foil.
3. Place potatoes in the center of the foil.
4. In a small bowl, combine oil and all seasonings.
5. Drizzle mixture over potatoes; stir gently to coat.
6. Fold and seal securely with tight double folds.
7. Place foil packet on gas grill over medium heat or on charcoal grill 4-6 inches from medium-high heat.
8. Cook for 30-40 minutes, or until tender.
9. Open the packet; stir gently.
10. Sprinkle with cheese.
11. Return to grill and cook an additional 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
12. Serve immediately.
Oven Directions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare potatoes in foil packet as described above.
3. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until potatoes are tender.
4. Open and stir gently; sprinkle with cheese.
5. Return to oven and bake an additional 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
